caption:
Know when to act and when to hold back.

A 2,000-year-old idea that still lands today. Bhagavad Gita 4:16 reminds us to focus on what's ours to control — the effort, not the outcome.

Follow @sattvic.app for a daily line from the Gita, in plain modern words.

#BhagavadGita #Gita #dailywisdom #mindfulness #stoicism #selfimprovement #philosophy #spirituality #Sattvic #innerpeace

Know when to act and when to hold back.

— Bhagavad Gita 4:16
#BhagavadGita #Gita #dailywisdom
